title: Titan Series™ 30''W x 72''L Plastic Bi-Folding Table
features: Titan Series™ 30''W x 72''L Plastic Bi-Folding Table .
Perfect for indoor or outdoor use.
This Titan Series 30''W x 72''L Commercial Grade Folding Table features a durable stain resistant blow molded top and sturdy frame.
The low maintenance blow molded top cleans easily.
This 6 ft. table folds in half for easy transporting and legs lock in to place in a SNAP for easy set-ups.
This table can be used as a temporary seating solution or set-up in a permanent location for everyday use and boasts a static weight capacity of 330 lbs.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 10 or more
